description_long: This is a two-tiered wooden shelf with a simple, rectangular design and a natural wood grain finish. The structure consists of two horizontal planks supported by four vertical legs, with the upper and lower shelves aligned parallel to each other. The wood appears to be solid and robust, with visible grain patterns that add a rustic aesthetic. There are no doors, drawers, or visible hardware, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance. The open design allows for easy access from both the front and sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. The shelf is freestanding and can be easily relocated as needed.
description: A freestanding, two-tiered wooden shelf with a rustic finish and open, minimalist design. It features two parallel shelves supported by four sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shelves and all four supporting legs, highlighting the open and accessible design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile and thickness of the wooden planks, with both shelves visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the open structure and parallel shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow profile and shelf alignment.
